meaning: n.关节造形术,关节形成术
examples: Objective to investigate the indications and effects of total knee arthroplasty.
The patella is integral to the overall success of total knee arthroplasty (TKA).
Secondly, we chose to compare mortality rates of primary and revision arthroplasty.
And when I asked Dr. Ferlic what could go wrong in the course of a total arthroplasty, he was completely honest.
